## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / behavior
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Tests only
- [ ] Chore (CI, tooling, refactoring without behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes locally
- [ ] User-facing behavior changed → `README.md` and/or `npm-sentinel help` updated if needed
- [ ] Security-sensitive change → no secrets in code or logs; see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) if disclosure is needed

## Related issues

Closes #
